code: import{configureStore}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';import accountReducer from'../redux/accountSlice';import shopReducer from'../redux/shopSlice';import messageReducer from'../redux/messageSlice';import designerReducer from'../redux/designerSlice';export var store=configureStore({reducer:{account:accountReducer,shop:shopReducer,message:messageReducer,designer:designerReducer}});
